ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fish_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fish species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the fish species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fish species */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the fish species (e.g., freshwater, saltwater) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the species record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the species record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the species record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the species record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fish species being measured */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the fish species */,
  "length1" REAL /* First length measurement of the fish species */,
  "length2" REAL /* Second length measurement of the fish species */,
  "length3" REAL /* Third length measurement of the fish species */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the fish species */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the fish species */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the measurement record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the measurement record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES fish_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the project record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the project record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_measurements" (
  "project_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project measurement */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the project measurement record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project measurement record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the project measurement record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project measurement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_measurements_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., grams, kilograms, meters) */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the unit record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the unit record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multimedia" (
  "multimedia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multimedia file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement associated with the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image/jpeg, video/mp4) */,
  "file_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the file */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multimedia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multimedia_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
